blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 10,602 ft. Strong winds with gusts to 50 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: partly cloudy, highs of 45°F, gusts to 50 mph.
Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 48°F, gusts to 47 mph.
Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 33".
